requirement.Summary: 40 CFR 112 — SPCC Plan maintained and certified
29 CFR 1910.119 — PSM compliance audit every 3 years

audit.Title: SPCC Compliance Audit
audit.Scope: Facility-level compliance review against applicable regulations.
audit.Recommendations: Remediate critical findings within 30 days; track via CAPA.

case.Title: Hydrocarbon sheen on water
case.Description: Compliance case opened following a reported event; under investigation per procedure.
case.Root Cause: Equipment failure due to deferred maintenance.
case.Remediation Plan: Corrective actions assigned via CAPA; verification scheduled.
case.Closure Summary: All corrective actions verified effective; case closed.

capa.Title: Replace cracked containment berm
capa.Description: Action arising from a compliance case to correct and prevent recurrence.

capa.Recurrence Prevention: Update procedure and add detective control.
